title: Skill Discovery
description: Skills are discovered by metadata and activated only when relevant.

steps.content: I need help writing release notes for changes under docs/.
steps.annotation: The request should trigger a documentation-oriented skill, not every skill.
The runtime checks metadata and activation rules before loading instructions.

steps.content:
Activated skill: release-notes-writer
Reason: matches docs path and changelog-style request
steps.annotation: The selected skill is injected because it is relevant, not because it merely exists.

steps.content: I loaded the release-notes skill for this task and can now draft a concise changelog entry for the docs updates.
steps.annotation: Discovery and conditional activation keep context lean.
